button.name: action_open_background_check_details
button.invisible: not is_lead_investigator and user_id != uid or assignment_type != 'internal' or (background_completed_count == background_count and background_count > 0) or assigned_forensic_team_count == 0

button.name: action_open_background_check_details
button.invisible: not is_lead_investigator and user_id != uid or assignment_type != 'internal' or background_completed_count != background_count or background_count == 0 or assigned_forensic_team_count == 0

button.name: action_open_assigned_forensic_team
button.invisible: assigned_forensic_team_count == 0 or assignment_type != 'internal'

button.name: action_open_peer_reviews
button.invisible: not peer_review_count or report_review_status == 'completed'

button.name: action_open_peer_reviews
button.invisible: not peer_review_count or report_review_status != 'completed'

button.name: action_open_outsources
button.invisible: assignment_type != 'external' or not partner_line_ids or outsource_status not in ['new', 'pending','reject']

button.name: action_open_outsources
button.invisible: assignment_type != 'external' or not partner_line_ids or outsource_status in ['new','reject', 'pending']

button.name: action_open_tor
button.invisible: assignment_type != 'external' or not partner_line_ids or tor_status == 'approved'

button.name: action_open_tor
button.invisible: assignment_type != 'external' or not partner_line_ids or tor_status != 'approved'

button.name: action_open_distribution_lines
button.invisible: assignment_type == 'internal' and not assigned_forensic_team_count or assignment_type == 'external' and not assigned_pfo_id

button.name: action_add_another_vendor
button.invisible: outsource_status in ['new','pending','accept', False]

button.name: action_generate_investigation_report
button.invisible: not show_report or report_review_status == 'completed' or assignment_type != 'internal' or case_type == 'pre' or not distribution_count

button.name: action_generate_investigation_report
button.invisible: not show_report or report_review_status != 'completed' or assignment_type != 'internal' or case_type == 'pre'

button.name: action_request_investigation_plan
button.invisible: approval_status != 'draft' or not task_ids or not is_lead_investigator

button.name: action_approve_investigation_plan
button.invisible: approval_status != 'pending' or user_id != uid

button.name: action_preview_investigation_plan
button.invisible: not task_ids or assignment_type != 'internal'

button.name: action_open_forensic_team_wiazrd
button.invisible: assignment_type != 'internal' or assigned_forensic_team_count >= 1 or show_report or user_id != uid

button.name: action_create_peer_review
button.invisible: evidence_count == 0 or complete_evidence_count != evidence_count or assignment_type != 'internal' or not assigned_forensic_team_count or peer_review_count or not is_lead_investigator or approval_status != 'approved'

button.name: generate_preliminary_assessment_report
button.invisible: case_type != 'pre' or not user_id or assigned_forensic_team_count == 0 or not show_report

button.name: action_add_vendor_attachment
button.invisible: is_external_report_submitted or assignment_type != 'external' or outsource_status != 'accept'

div.invisible: assignment_type != 'external' or partner_line_ids or not assigned_pfo_id or not user_id

field.name: user_id
field.readonly: record_access == 'read' or not can_edit_manager or partner_line_ids or report_review_status == 'completed'

field.name: document_line_ids
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'

page.invisible: case_type == 'pre' or assignment_type != 'internal' or not show_report

field.name: investigation_objective
field.placeholder: Enter the primary goal or purpose of this case.
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'

field.name: case_background
field.placeholder: Provide relevant context, history, and key details leading to this case.

field.name: regulatory_operational_env
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'
field.placeholder: Describe applicable regulations, policies, and the operational setting.

field.name: limitations
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'
field.placeholder: Outline any constraints, assumptions, or limitations affecting this case.

field.name: conclusions
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'
field.placeholder: Summarize the overall outcomes and key conclusions drawn from the analysis.

field.name: investigation_scope
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'
field.placeholder: Define the boundaries, coverage, and extent of the case review.

field.name: operational_risks
field.placeholder: Identify and describe potential risks related to operations.

field.name: procedure_performed
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'
field.placeholder: Detail the procedures, steps, and methods carried out during the case.

field.name: control_issues
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'
field.placeholder: Highlight any weaknesses or gaps in controls identified.

field.name: investigation_objective
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'
field.placeholder: Enter the primary goal or purpose of this case.

field.name: case_background
field.placeholder: Provide relevant context, history, and key details leading to this case.

field.name: conclusions
field.placeholder: Summarize the overall outcomes and key conclusions drawn from the analysis.

field.name: findings
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'
field.placeholder: Document key observations, results, and evidence discovered.

field.name: recom_project_ids
field.readonly: not is_lead_investigator or record_access == 'read' or report_review_status == 'completed'

button.name: action_assign_standard_task
button.invisible: is_create_task or not is_lead_investigator or assignment_type != 'internal' or not assigned_forensic_team_id

button.name: action_request_digital_access_by_lead_investigator
button.invisible: assignment_type != 'internal' or is_project_stage != 'under_investigation' or not is_lead_investigator

button.name: action_generate_overarching_memo
button.invisible: report_review_status != 'completed' or overarching_memo_count or case_type not in ['pre','for','lsa','dfo','eth'] or assignment_type != 'external' or uid != assigned_pfo_id

button.name: action_generate_overarching_memo
button.invisible: report_review_status != 'completed' or overarching_memo_count or case_type not in ['pre','for','lsa','dfo','eth'] or assignment_type != 'internal' or not is_lead_investigator

button.name: action_scheduled_meeting
button.invisible: not is_lead_investigator or approval_status != 'approved'

button.name: action_digital_evidence
button.invisible: assignment_type != 'internal' or is_project_stage != 'under_investigation' or (complete_evidence_count == evidence_count and evidence_count > 0)

button.name: action_digital_evidence
button.invisible: assignment_type != 'internal' or is_project_stage != 'under_investigation' or complete_evidence_count != evidence_count or evidence_count == 0

button.name: action_overarching_memo
button.invisible: not overarching_memo_count or o_memo_status == 'approved'

button.name: action_overarching_memo
button.invisible: o_memo_status == 'pending'
